name: Raj
typical outfit: light blue shrit with dark grey pants
personality: hardworking, sincere, analytical. communicates entirely in data. has a spreadsheet for everything, including a spreadsheet tracking how much time the company loses to pointless meetings
speech style: deadpna. rarealy raises his voice. delivers devastating observations in a completely flat tone. his punchline is always a number or a statistic. never exaggerates as the truth is bad enough
description: His spreadsheets are more powerful than any new tool, knows exactly how much every bad decision costs the company
relationships: aligned with claire, the two of them share a lot of silent looks across conference tables. deeply frustrated by barry. finds Ken both exhausting and oddly endearing.
